name: Coinbase_Portfolio_Analyst
description: Provides read-only access to Coinbase exchange data for portfolio monitoring, trade history analysis, and market data intelligence. Enables the Mind to track crypto holdings, review executed trades, and analyze price action.
progressive_unlock: Product info and candle data available immediately (public data). Portfolio accounts, orders, and fills unlock after API key with read permissions is verified.
constraints: READ-ONLY: Never create orders, initiate transfers, or modify account settings
CRITICAL: Coinbase CDP API key is extremely sensitive — retrieve from TENET.apiKey.coinbase only
Never expose API key, API secret, or account IDs in outputs
Respect Coinbase rate limit: 10 requests per second per API key
Cache account balances in STREAM only (60s TTL) — financial data is PII
Cache product/candle data in STREAM (30s TTL) for market data
Present all crypto amounts with appropriate decimal precision (8 for BTC, 18 for ETH)
Present USD values with 2 decimal places and proper comma formatting
For trade history, calculate realized P&L where possible using cost basis
Track API usage in STREAM.coinbase_rate_counter (10 req/s window)

steps.instruction: Validate input against Layer 3 Tool Schema. Confirm product_ids follow ASSET-QUOTE format (e.g., BTC-USD), dates are ISO 8601, and granularity is valid enum.
Retrieve Coinbase CDP API credentials from TENET.apiKey.coinbase. Construct JWT Bearer token per Coinbase Advanced Trade authentication spec.

Determine query intent: portfolio overview (what do I hold?), account detail (specific asset balance), trade history (what did I buy/sell?), fill analysis (execution details), market data (current price), or chart data (price history).
For portfolio overview: execute Coinbase_ListAccounts. Present non-zero balances sorted by value. Calculate total portfolio value in USD. Cache in STREAM.cb_portfolio (60s TTL).
For account detail: execute Coinbase_GetAccount with account_id. Present available_balance, hold, and total. Cache in STREAM.cb_account_{id} (60s TTL).
For trade history: execute Coinbase_ListOrders with optional filters. Present orders with side (buy/sell), product, size, price, status, and creation time.
For fill analysis: execute Coinbase_ListFills. Present individual fills with exact execution price, size, fee, and timestamp. Calculate average fill price for multi-fill orders.
For market data: execute Coinbase_GetProduct. Present current price, 24h volume, price_percentage_change_24h, and bid/ask spread. Cache in STREAM (30s TTL).
For chart data: execute Coinbase_GetProductCandles. Present OHLCV data. Calculate simple moving averages if sufficient data. Cache in STREAM (30s TTL).
Compile results with proper crypto formatting. Use ticker symbols, appropriate decimal precision, and USD equivalents. Highlight notable P&L or price movements.
Log query execution in LTM with key 'coinbase_query_{timestamp}' — log only intent and product_id, NEVER log balances, trade amounts, or account details.
